title: Swords Plus
description: Name a Netherite or Diamond Sword and get a Custom Texture.
body:
Rename any netherite or diamond sword in an anvil to get a custom texture.

### **Names:**
- Potassium
- Molten Sword
- Blade of Olympus
- Blade of The Spirit
- Emerald Sword
- Cosmic Sword

Most of the swords also change appearance when enchanted.

## Disclaimer:
**This Will Only Work On Versions 1.21.5+**
